headline: Quanta Adds Supply Chain Veteran Joseph Kim To Guide Execution And Capital Returns
summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) has appointed Joseph Kim to its Board of Directors. Kim brings extensive experience in supply chain, logistics, and large scale operational management. The appointment marks a corporate governance development that may influence future initiatives and risk oversight. For investors following NYSE:PWR, this board change comes at a time when energy infrastructure, grid resiliency, and large project execution remain central themes for contractors and service providers...
